speaker: MATT
raw_text: "I would not recommend trying. Okay. Gustav, what's-- I can't read your last name. You've been given quite a debt for Trostenwald so you shall remain here until you've worked off the debt to the city. To the number of 2,645 gold pieces. To make up for the deaths of our two crownsguard, of the two civilians who have died, and the general cost of this entire investigation. We'll consider what your work is to the city tomorrow. However, the rest of you: you're free to go. I'm going to go get myself some sleep."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You can't, she's chained up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I scoop her up.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is even more awkward. Just put me back down. Put me back down.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Just let it happen.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No! The chains are pulling me one way and you're pulling me the other way. Just come down to my level! Come down here!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Bring the two others forward." They bring forward Gustav and Bosun. "This is your circus, right?" He goes, "It is my circus and I take full responsibility for what's happened. Sincerely. They have done nothing wrong. They are completely innocent. I brought this creature into our fold and that is on me. Whatever judgement you have, bring onto my head, not theirs. Please. I implore you." "Fine. I'll consider the investigation closed. You're all freed of charges against you. Including the goblin."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh! Thank you! I would kiss you if I could.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "For four healing potions," and he pulls them out and plops them on the table, "240 gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, my friends keep dying. Do you have any health potions?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We have a handful, that is correct. How many are you looking to purchase?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How many do you have?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Four."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ooh. That will last us probably, like, a day.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "What do you do for a living?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're superheroes.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sword jugglers.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Why would-- Fine, who am I to ask?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Look at this bruise.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I cut fungus for a living."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Look, it's in the shape of a dick.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm not going to ask. Four? Did you want them?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Sure, yes. How much for four healing potions?
